devdoc.details: Mirrors Zama template patterns: uses FHE.fromExternal, FHE.allowThis, FHE.allow and returns ciphertext handles.

params.inputProof: Single proof matching all provided encrypted handles

devdoc.title: DeFi Risk Analyzer (FHEVM)

ZamaProtocolUnsupported().notice: Returned if the Zama protocol is not supported on the current chain

analyze(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,bytes).notice: Submit encrypted profile and compute encrypted recommendations.

getAll().notice: Convenience getter: returns all encrypted outputs for the caller.

getRecommendations().notice: Returns the caller's encrypted recommended portfolio split.

getRiskLevel().notice: Returns the caller's encrypted risk level handle.

getRiskScore().notice: Returns the caller's encrypted risk score handle.

userdoc.notice: Single-contract encrypted DeFi risk scoring and portfolio recommendation.
